name: Attribute Theft
description:
Are you not happy with your body? Is envy a constant in your life? Well, not for long! As in this world, you have the power to steal virtually ANY Asset (some are gender locked, I don't make the rules :P).

Yeah, so, I've always had an Attribute Theft bot on my mind, and haven't really found a good one, so I tried making one. I can't guarantee that EVERYTHING will be perfect, so just fuck around and find out, I guess. Whatever you can think of stealing, you can.

If you have ideas of your own you want to implement, let me know. I'll try what I can. I also wanted to thank y'all for over 600 followers. Thanksies! Anyway, I have nothing else to say, have fun.

Improvement suggestions and feedback, or even a like, are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine. Any negative comment that's completely subjective or a joke comment will be removed. So if you have something to say, let it be constructive and objective. Thanks.
creator: Etoro
